svg.title: User Access Server — Database Architecture
svg.desc: System architecture showing roles, modules, and database tables for a user access control server

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Admin role permissions')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Sales role permissions')
sendPrompt('What can a Tester role access?')
sendPrompt('What can a Viewer role see?')
sendPrompt('How does the authentication engine work in this system?')
g.text: Login · Session token · Role lookup · Permission check

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tables are in the Account module?')
sendPrompt('What tables are in the Stock module?')
sendPrompt('What tables are in the Sales module?')
sendPrompt('What does the Admin module contain?')
sendPrompt('Show me the SQL CREATE TABLE for users')
sendPrompt('Show me the SQL CREATE TABLE for roles and permissions')
sendPrompt('Show me the SQL CREATE TABLE for products')
sendPrompt('Show me the SQL CREATE TABLE for orders and order_items')
sendPrompt('Show me the SQL CREATE TABLE for audit_logs')
sendPrompt('Show me the SQL CREATE TABLE for sessions')
